ops.body: Lane B started in workspace cc-steer-wb. Pre-flight identity check done: verdict identity is (dedup_key, role, prompt_version) — tests/test_store.py:306 proves model (and a fortiori harness flags) is provenance only, so tools=""/max_turns=1 needs no version bumps. Fix targets cc_steer.claude.cached_judge's ClaudeConfig (adds max_turns=1, tools="", disable_slash_commands=True; output_format not needed — spawnllm forces --output-format json on the response_model/schema path). Measurement protocol registered on WF-A ledger 556d952f2: n=14 summary-fidelity frozen rows from a cp -c clone of the _base-20260719 snapshot, sonnet/medium, OLD-vs-NEW plus in-run old-vs-old replicate, capture shim envelopes, gate = usd/row AND tok/row win + category agreement >= 0.750 floor + accept parity.
